title: How to sound smart in your TEDx Talk | Will Stephen | TEDxNewYork

transcript.chinese: 译者：Gustavo Rocha 审稿人：Ariana Bleau Lugo
transcript.english: Translator: Gustavo Rocha Reviewer: Ariana Bleau Lugo
Hear that?
That's nothing.

transcript.chinese: 这就是我作为今天会议上的发言人向大家介绍的内容。
transcript.english: Which is what I, as a speaker at today's conference, have for you all.
I have nothing.
Nada.
Zip.
Zilch.
Zippo.
Nothing smart.
Nothing inspirational.

transcript.chinese: 甚至根本没有进行任何远程研究。
transcript.english: Nothing even remotely researched at all.
I have absolutely nothing to say whatsoever.

transcript.chinese: 然而，通过我的说话方式，我会让人觉得我确实这么做了。
transcript.english: And yet, through my manner of speaking, I will make it seem like I do.

transcript.chinese: 就像我说的很精彩一样。
transcript.english: Like what I am saying is brilliant.

transcript.chinese: 也许，只是也许，你会觉得自己学到了一些东西。
transcript.english: And maybe, just maybe, you will feel like you've learned something.

transcript.chinese: 现在，我要开始开幕式了。
transcript.english: Now, I'm going to get started with the opening.
I'm going to make  a lot of hand gestures.

transcript.chinese: 我要用右手做这个，我要用左手做这个。
transcript.english: I'm going to do this with my right hand, I'm going to do this with my left.
I'm going to adjust my glasses.

transcript.chinese: 然后我要问大家一个问题。
transcript.english: And then I'm going to ask you all a question.

transcript.chinese: 通过举手，你们中有多少人以前被问过问题？
transcript.english: By a show of hands, how many of you all have been asked a question before?

transcript.chinese: （笑声） 好的，太好了，我看到了一些手。
transcript.english: (Laughter) Okay, great, I'm seeing some hands.

transcript.chinese: 再说一次，我这里什么也没有。
transcript.english: And again, I have nothing here.

transcript.chinese: 现在，我要对此做出反应，表现得就像我在告诉你一件个人轶事一样。
transcript.english: Now, I'm gonna react to that and act like I'm telling you a personal anecdote.

transcript.chinese: 一些可以打破紧张的事情。
transcript.english: Something to break the tension.

transcript.chinese: 一些让我自己喜欢的东西。
transcript.english: Something to endear myself a little bit.
Something kind of embarrassing.
And you guys  are going to make an "aw" sound.
It's true.
It really happened.

transcript.chinese: （笑声） 现在我要把它带到一个更广泛的角度。
transcript.english: (Laughter) And now I'm going to bring it to a broader point.
I'm going to really beckon.
I'm going to make it intellectual.
I'm going to bring it to this man right here.

transcript.chinese: 现在，我确信这个人所做的事情很重要。
transcript.english: Now, what this man did was important, I'm sure.
(Laughter) But I, for one, have no idea who he is.

transcript.chinese: 我只是用谷歌搜索了“科学家”这个词。 （笑声） 现在你看，我希望它看起来像是我在提出观点，建立一个论点，激励你改变你的生活，而实际上，这只是我......
transcript.english: I simply googled image the word "Scientist." (Laughter) And now you see, I'd like it to seem like I'm making points, building an argument, inspiring you to change your life, when in reality, this is just me...
buying...
time...

transcript.chinese: 现在，如果你不相信我，让我们看看这些数字。
transcript.english: Now, if you don't believe me, let's take a look at the numbers.

transcript.chinese: 这是现在正在发生的真实的事情。
transcript.english: This is a real thing that's happening right now.

transcript.chinese: 我要演讲的次数是一场。
transcript.english: The number of talks that I'm giving is one.

transcript.chinese: 到目前为止，在上述谈话中所传达的有趣事实，好吧，这将是零。
transcript.english: Interesting facts imparted thus far in said talk, well, that's going to be a zero.
My height in inches is 70.5.
Note the .5 there.
2x6 equals 12.
And then interestingly enough 6x2 also equals 12.
That's math.
352 is a three-digit number 1, 2, 3, 4, 5 and then almost immediately following that we get 6, 7, 8, 9, 10.

transcript.chinese: 现在，为了在这里添加更多填充物，我将给您更多一些数字供您考虑，呃... 18。
transcript.english: Now, to add more filler here, I'm going to give you a couple more number to consider, uh ... 18.
2.6 million.
Four.
Four.
Staggering!
(Laughter) These are real numbers, all of them.

transcript.chinese: 接下来，让我们看一些图表。
transcript.english: And to follow that up, let's take a look at some graphs.

transcript.chinese: 现在，如果你看一下这个饼图，你会看到大多数人远远超过少数人。
transcript.english: Now, if you take a look at this pie chart, what you're going to see is that the majority far exceeds the minority.
Everybody see that?
Cool, isn't it?

transcript.chinese: 让我们看一下这个条形图，因为它显示了类似的不相关数据。
transcript.english: And let's take a look at this bar graph, 'cause it shows similarly irrelevant data.

transcript.chinese: 现在，我这样做是因为我想让别人觉得我已经完成了我的作业。
transcript.english: Now, I'm doing this because I'd like to make it seem like I've done my homework.

transcript.chinese: 比如说，如果您在 YouTube 上关闭声音观看此视频，您可能会想，“啊，好吧。
transcript.english: If you were, say, watching this on YouTube with the sound off, you might think, "Ah, okay.

transcript.chinese: 这家伙知道他在说什么。”但我不这么认为。
transcript.english: This guy knows what he's talking about." But I don't.

transcript.chinese: 我陷入了挣扎，惊慌失措。
transcript.english: I'm floundering, panicking.
I've got nothing.

transcript.chinese: 我是一个彻头彻尾的骗子。
transcript.english: I'm a total and utter phony.
But you know what?

transcript.chinese: 有人邀请我参加 TED 演讲。
transcript.english: I was offered a TED Talk.

transcript.chinese: 该死的，我会坚持到底的。
transcript.english: And dammit, I'm gonna see it through.

transcript.chinese: （笑声）现在，如果你看看我身后，这些只是文字和隐约发人深省的照片。
transcript.english: (Laughter) Now, if you take a look behind me, these are just words paired with vaguely thought-provoking stock photos.

transcript.chinese: 我会指出他们，就像我在利用我的时间和你的时间一样。
transcript.english: I'm going to point at them like I'm making use both of my time as well as your time.

transcript.chinese: 但实际上，我不知道其中一半是什么意思。
transcript.english: But in reality, I don't know what half of them mean.

transcript.chinese: 现在，随着这些的继续，我将开始说些胡言乱语。
transcript.english: And now, as these continue, I'm just going to start saying gibberish.
Wagga wah, gabba gabba.
Turkey, mouth and a mouth.

transcript.chinese: 奇普，旅行，我的狗斯基普。
transcript.english: Chip, trip, my dog Skip.

transcript.chinese: 理查德，撕开它并浸入其中。
transcript.english: Rip it and dip it, Richard.
I'm an itty-bitty baby bopper.
And I'm hungry in my tum tum.
Brad Pitt, Uma Thurman.
Names, things.

transcript.chinese: 言语，言语还有更多的东西。
transcript.english: Words, words and more things.
And see?

transcript.chinese: 感觉这可能是有道理的，不是吗？
transcript.english: It feels like it might make sense, doesn't it?

transcript.chinese: 就像也许，只是也许，我正在得出某种令人满意的结论，我的意思是，我打着手势，就好像我是这样。
transcript.english: Like maybe, just maybe, I'm building to some sort of satisfying conclusion, I mean, I'm gesticulating as though I am.

transcript.chinese: 我在踱步，我的强度越来越大，我摘下眼镜，顺便说一句，它只是镜框。
transcript.english: I'm pacing, I'm growing in intensity, I'm taking off my glasses, which by the way, are just frames.

transcript.chinese: （笑声）我戴着它们是为了看起来很聪明，尽管我的视力很完美。
transcript.english: (Laughter) I wore them to look smart, even though my vision is perfect.

transcript.chinese: 现在我要放慢一点速度。
transcript.english: And now I'm going to slow things down a little bit.
I'm going to change the tone.

transcript.chinese: 我会让它看起来像是我正在建设一个时刻。
transcript.english: I'm going to make it seem like I'm building to a moment.
And what if I was?
(Laughter) Amazing, isn't it?
What can we do?
Life's a roller coaster.

transcript.chinese: 你知道，如果你想从我的演讲中学到一件事，我希望你想想你一开始听到的内容，我希望你想想你现在听到的内容。
transcript.english: You know, if there's one thing you'd take away from my talk, I'd like you to think about what you heard at the beginning, and I'd like you to think about what you hear now.

transcript.chinese: 因为它什么都不是，现在仍然什么都不是，想一想。
transcript.english: Because it was nothing and it's still nothing, think about that.
Or don't, that's fine.
And now I'm going to stop talking.
Thank you.
(Applause)
